subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Direct thine efforts, day and night, to the triumph of the Cause of the Lord of Oneness, that the power of the Lord of Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی همت را شب و روز بر نصرت امر حضرت احدیت بگمار تا قدرت رب عزت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
